headline: Mondelez Faces ESG Votes As Star Wars Tie In Shapes Valuation
summary: Shareholders at Mondelez International are set to vote on proposals tied to plastics packaging policies and board governance at the upcoming annual meeting, which the company recommends voting against. Mondelez has announced a collaboration with Lucasfilm to launch Grogu themed Nilla Nummies, aligned with the release of a new Star Wars film. For investors watching NasdaqGS:MDLZ, these updates come as the stock trades around $57.61, with a return of 7.4% year to date and 7.8% over five...

headline: Is Mondelez International (MDLZ) Attractively Priced After Mixed Multi‑Year Share Performance
summary: If you are wondering whether Mondelez International at around US$57.61 is a bargain or just fairly priced, the key is to look closely at what the numbers say about value, not just the brand name. The stock is up 0.6% over the past week and 0.3% over the past month, with a 7.4% gain year to date but a 9.2% decline over the past year and an 18.3% decline over three years. These mixed returns sit against a backdrop where long term brand strength and consumer staples exposure keep Mondelez on...
